ddls:
CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event where the race took place */,
  "boat_class" TEXT /* Class of the boats participating in the race */,
  "race_date" TEXT /* Date of the race */,
  "race_location" TEXT /* Location where the race was held */,
  "race_type" TEXT /* Type of the race (e.g., short course, long distance) */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the race */,
  "race_distance" REAL /* Distance of the race in nautical miles */,
  "race_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the race */,
  "race_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the race */,
  "race_status" TEXT /* Status of the race (e.g., completed, postponed, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "boats" (
  "boat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each boat */,
  "sail_number" TEXT /* Sail number of the boat */,
  "boat_class" TEXT /* Class of the boat */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the boat owner */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the boat was registered */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the boat */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the boat */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the boat was built */,
  "boat_length" REAL /* Length of the boat in meters */,
  "boat_weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the boat in kilograms */,
  "boat_color" TEXT /* Color of the boat */,
  "boat_registration_number" TEXT /* Official registration number of the boat */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("boat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crew_members" (
  "crew_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crew member */,
  "crew_name" TEXT /* Name of the crew member */,
  "boat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the boat the crew member is associated with */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the crew member (e.g., helmsman, crew) */,
  "experience_level" TEXT /* Experience level of the crew member (e.g., novice, intermediate, expert) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the crew member */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the crew member */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the crew member */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the crew member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the crew member */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the emergency contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crew_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crew_members_boat_id FOREIGN KEY ("boat_id") REFERENCES boats ("boat_id")
)
column_names: Name of the event where the race took place
Class of the boats participating in the race
Location where the race was held
Type of the race (e.g., short course, long distance)
Distance of the race in nautical miles
Status of the race (e.g., completed, postponed, canceled)
Length of the boat in meters
Weight of the boat in kilograms
Official registration number of the boat
Unique identifier for each crew member
ID of the boat the crew member is associated with
Role of the crew member (e.g., helmsman, crew)
Experience level of the crew member (e.g., novice, intermediate, expert)
Date of birth of the crew member
Contact number of the crew member
Email address of the crew member
Contact number of the emergency contact
